steps.title: Recall the definition of supplementary angles
steps.content: Supplementary angles are two angles whose measures add up to 180 degrees. Therefore, if $x$ and $y$ are supplementary, then by definition:

steps.title: Rearrange to solve for y
steps.content:
Starting from $x + y = 180$, subtract $x$ from both sides to isolate $y$:
$$y = 180 - x$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
